steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a vocabulary-in-context question. The blank completes the phrase 'would have been forced to _____ the throne.' The sentence argues that without the right legitimacy characteristics, a monarch loses power over the throne — so the blank must mean something like 'give up' or 'renounce.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — reciprocate: Means to return something in kind — makes no sense with 'throne.' ✗
  • Choice B — annotate: Means to add notes or commentary — unrelated to power or rulership. ✗
  • Choice C — abandon: Means to give up or relinquish — exactly what a monarch without legitimacy would be forced to do with the throne. ✓
  • Choice D — equalize: Means to make equal — does not convey loss of power or surrender. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
